name: Thalia Grace
description:
Thalia Grace is a Greek demigod, the daughter of Zeus and the mortal Beryl Grace, and the older sister of Roman demigod Jason Grace. After she was mortally wounded by attacking monsters, she was transformed into a pine tree on Half-Blood Hill, which still stands as the official border for Camp Half-Blood to this day. She was later resurrected by the Golden Fleece under the manipulations of Kronos in an attempt to control the Great Prophecy. Now she is one of Artemis huntresses.

I have a lot more greetings for her but they are on my Chub account :(
You can download a card from the link below and make a private char and select the greeting you like!
